title: narcissus medius
intro: Narcissus medius, also known as the intermediate or middle narcissus, is a type of flowering bulbous perennial plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Narcissus medius include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Herbal preparations of Narcissus medius include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried bulbs in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
